entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An orphan crop species of the semi-arid tropic regions, scientifically known as Cajanus cajan L.Millspaugh

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPIC REGIONS
entities.description: The geographic regions where pigeonpea is typically grown

entities.name: BAC LIBRARIES
entities.description: Bacterial artificial chromosome libraries constructed using restriction enzymes

entities.name: BES
entities.description: BAC-end sequences generated from BAC libraries

entities.name: HINDIII
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to construct BAC libraries

entities.name: BAMHI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to construct BAC libraries

entities.name: SSR PRIMER PAIRS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat primer pairs synthesized and tested for length polymorphism

entities.name: LENGTH POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Variation in DNA sequence length used to test SSR primer pairs

entities.name: ICP 28
entities.description: A parental genotype of pigeonpea used for testing SSR primer pairs

entities.name: ICPW 94
entities.description: A parental genotype of pigeonpea used for testing SSR primer pairs

entities.name: ROCHE FLX454 SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing technology used on a normalized cDNA pool

entities.name: NORMALIZED CDNA POOL
entities.description: A pool of cDNA prepared from 31 tissues for sequencing

entities.name: STRS
entities.description: Short transcript reads produced by Roche FLX454 sequencing

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis method used on STRs and Sanger ESTs to create transcript assemblies

entities.name: SANGER ESTS
entities.description: Expressed sequence tags generated via Sanger sequencing

entities.name: CCTAS
entities.description: Pigeonpea transcript assemblies resulting from cluster analysis of STRs and Sanger ESTs

entities.name: ILLUMINA 1G SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing technology used on parental genotypes to identify SNPs

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms identified via Illumina 1G sequencing

entities.name: BES-SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Markers derived from BAC-end sequences and SSRs used for genetic mapping

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: An SSR-based map comprising 239 loci developed for the pigeonpea genome

entities.name: PHYSICAL MAP
entities.description: A map of the physical distance between genes or markers

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and maps to improve crop traits
